name: No witnesses to my trip at construction site in Draper Utah, still file comp?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my trip at construction site in Draper Utah, still file comp?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, medical records and your account prove work comp claim.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, your testimony, medical records, job details suffice for workers' comp proof.[2] No need for witnesses like lawsuits.[4] Key factors: consistent story; photos if possible; supervisor report helps.[2] Document scene immediately, treat ASAP, lawyer builds case without witnesses.[3] Focus on medical link.
